creator: adamw@FreeBSD.org
text:
Not to mention, the DKIM option in mail/spamassassin also has an explicit dependency on p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-RSA.

Submitter, I'm going to suggest that you may have accidentally deleted p5-Crypt-OpenSSL-RSA somehow. The dependency is there in two different places.

I'm closing this PR as Unable to Reproduce, but if you can reproduce this problem please re-open it.
